initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT
    s_store_id,
    s_state,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM
    store_returns,
    store,
    date_dim
WHERE
    store_returns.sr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    AND store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    AND date_dim.d_year = 1998
    AND date_dim.d_moy = 9
GROUP BY
    s_store_id,
    s_state
ORDER BY
    total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  s_store_id,
  s_state,
  SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM
  store_returns,
  store,
  date_dim
WHERE
  store_returns.sr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
  AND store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  AND date_dim.d_year = 1998
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 9
GROUP BY
  s_store_id,
  s_state
ORDER BY
  total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT s_store_id, s_state, SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM store_returns
JOIN store ON store_returns.sr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998
  AND date_dim.d_moy = 9
GROUP BY s_store_id, s_state
ORDER BY total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT s_store_id, s_state, SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM store_returns
JOIN store ON store_returns.sr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
JOIN date_dim ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE date_dim.d_year = 1998 AND date_dim.d_moy = 9
GROUP BY s_store_id, s_state
ORDER BY total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 100

WHERE
    store_returns.sr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
